rulings.Case Title: YOSHABEL CLEMENTS VS. HARCOURT GROUP, et al

rulings.Case Title: MIDMARKET PROJECT LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. NEW CENTRAL HOTEL AND HOSTEL LLC DBA NEW CENTRAL et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 9, 2014, line 1. Plaintiff's Motion For Summary Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden and show its entitlement to the Judgment a matter of law on causes of action for declaratory relief. Plaintiff failed to allege in the complaint an actual controversy and lack of remedy at all. Both disputes may be addressed and resolved by a breach of contract cause of action for landlord's alleged breaches of the lease by premature rent demand and failure to install separate water meter. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIDMARKET PROJECT LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. NEW CENTRAL HOTEL AND HOSTEL LLC DBA NEW CENTRAL et al
